news.t: Now Trading: Direxion's New Bull & Bear ETFs for Shopify & Lockheed Martin

holdings.infoBox: LMTL is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily LMT Bull 2X ETF (LMTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price performance of the common shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation (LMT). LMTL was launched on Aug 6, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Now Trading: Direxion's New Bull & Bear ETFs for Shopify & Lockheed Martin
data.text: NEW YORK, NY / ACCESS Newswire / August 6, 2025 / Direxion, a leading provider of ETFs for tactical traders, and a pioneer in Single Stock Daily Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, today launched four new funds...
